quantities.name: simplec_iterations
quantities.source: case.toml time.min_steps; stable long-iteration convergence window

quantities.name: simplec_converged
quantities.source: transient PISO pressure-velocity coupling residuals satisfy time.tolerance after min_steps

quantities.name: max_abs_corrected_divergence
quantities.source: pressure-correction equation residual; not the reconstructed velocity divergence

quantities.name: max_abs_underrelaxed_corrected_divergence
quantities.source: continuity residual after pressure_under_relaxation scaling; SIMPLEC convergence residual

quantities.name: max_abs_corrected_field_divergence_after_boundary
quantities.source: explicit pressure-corrected phi divergence after boundary flux constraints

quantities.name: pressure_correction_rhs_active_sum
quantities.source: pressure-correction RHS sum after skipping p'=0 constraint rows

quantities.name: max_abs_corrected_velocity_delta_interior
quantities.source: transient velocity update outside velocity-constrained boundary owner cells; diagnostic, not PISO coupling convergence

quantities.name: max_abs_corrected_velocity_delta_boundary
quantities.source: velocity-constrained boundary owner cells are fixed by moving/no-slip wall constraints

quantities.name: pressure_solve_converged
quantities.source: pressure linear solve smoke threshold (PCG or GMRES)
